_meta.description: BCT daily prices from DeFi Llama. Full 1491-observation dataset was used to generate fig_price_quality and price_quality_results.json. DeFi Llama free API now returns sparse historical data for BCT. All computed statistics are preserved in price_quality_results.json.
_meta.refetch_note: Only 4 of 1015 daily requests returned data. Full dataset not recoverable from free API.
